security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote data may be altered without detection.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not validate vote integrity.

assumptions: The governance contract does not validate the integrity of vote data.
The actor has the ability to intercept and modify the vote message.

mitigation.strategy: Implement data integrity checks for vote data.

description: An attacker may modify the vote data before it reaches the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote submission lacks proper auditing and logging.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Lack of audit trail makes it difficult to trace votes.

assumptions: The governance contract does not record sufficient information to trace votes back to the original submitter.
The system does not provide an immutable audit log of votes.

mitigation.strategy: Implement detailed logging and auditing of vote submissions.

description: An attacker may submit a vote and deny their participation.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote data may be exposed during transmission.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Vote data is transmitted without sufficient encryption.

assumptions: Vote data is transmitted over an insecure channel.
The actor is able to intercept network traffic.

mitigation.strategy: Secure the communication channel using HTTPS and encryption.

description: An attacker may intercept vote data during transmission.
